CustomField.formula: IF( AND( Certification_Expiration_Date__c < TODAY() + 60, Certification_Expiration_Date__c >= TODAY() ), IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/warning24.png", "Yellow"), IF( Certification_Expiration_Date__c < TODAY(), IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/error24.png", "Red"), '' ) )
CustomField.label: Status Icon
